title: security breach objects, blocks, & more open beta
description: the modrinth port of the open beta from curse forge of the mod security breach objects, blocks, & more
body:
has only up to some blocks/models from the lobby to the daycare

this does have an RTX feature to so even if your computer doesn't support it it will still work

if you are making a map with this please credit this mod to this page, please

this will help with your map-making

has the lobby floor, everything (almost to do with the vents), posters such as the elevator posters that you see, music discs, tiles, carpets, and more

when in controls go to misc. and go to Freddy overlay to change the key binding

Warning: Freddy does play a very sad song when he dies

you can donate through this link

thanks to everyone for beta testing this

https://ko-fi.com/securitybreachobjectsblocksetc
